channel.title: Microverse
channel.description: System monitoring for macOS with elegant desktop widgets

item.title: Microverse 0.3.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.3.0

  • 🔒 Secure auto-update system with Sparkle framework
  • ⚙️ Redesigned Settings interface with elegant dark glass aesthetic
  • 🎨 Enhanced UI components following unified design system
  • 🔧 Improved system monitoring performance
  • ✨ Better desktop widget integration

System Requirements

macOS 11.0 or later

item.title: Microverse 0.2.0
item.description:
What's New in 0.2.0

  • 🎯 Enhanced battery health insights and scoring
  • 📊 Improved CPU and memory monitoring accuracy
  • 🎨 Refined UI with better color contrast and readability
  • ⚡ Performance optimizations for lower CPU usage
  • 🐛 Various bug fixes and stability improvements

System Requirements

macOS 11.0 or later

item.title: Microverse 0.1.1
item.description:
What's New in 0.1.1

  • 🔧 Fixed widget positioning on external displays
  • 🎨 Improved dark mode appearance
  • ⚡ Reduced battery impact during idle periods
  • 🐛 Bug fixes for menu bar percentage display

System Requirements

macOS 11.0 or later

item.title: Microverse 0.1.0
item.description:
Initial Release - Welcome to Microverse! 🚀

  • 🔋 Real-time battery monitoring with health insights
  • 🖥️ CPU usage tracking with multi-core support
  • 🧠 Memory pressure monitoring and usage statistics
  • 📱 6 desktop widget styles for different workflows
  • 🎯 Elegant tabbed interface with system overview
  • 📍 Menu bar integration with customizable display
  • ⚡ <1% CPU usage with adaptive refresh rates
  • 🎨 Beautiful glass-effect UI following macOS design

Features

  • Battery Tab: Charge level, health score, cycle count, time remaining
  • CPU Tab: Usage percentage, load averages, temperature monitoring
  • Memory Tab: Usage breakdown, pressure indicators, swap usage
  • Overview Tab: All metrics in one unified view
  • Desktop Widgets: Battery Simple, CPU Monitor, Memory Monitor, System Glance, System Status, System Dashboard

System Requirements

macOS 11.0 or later
